dct_title_s: Insurance maps of San Francisco, California
dct_description_sm: Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Index maps and indexes listing streets (numerical tabs on fore-edges correspond to indexes); each volume contains additional indexes for updates.
Shows streets, railroads, buildings, property lines, pipelines, etc.
Maps have indexes, keys, compass roses, and some are updated with paste-on slips.
Includes separate volume for index: General index Sanborn maps San Francisco, Cal.

Vol. 1. Van Ness & Market to Embarcadero -- vol. 2. Market & 16th to Embarcadero -- vol. 3. Van Ness to Arguello, Embarcadero to Geary (including Fort Mason) -- vol. 4. Van Ness to Arguello, 17th to Geary -- vol. 5. Golden Gate Park to Presidio, Arguello to Pacific Ocean -- vol. 6. 16th to Army, Pacific Ocean to Valencia -- vol. 7. 17th St. to 30th, Valencia to Twin Peaks -- vol. 8. Army to Cambridge, Mission to Pacific Ocean -- vol. 9. Silver/Mission to Juniperro Serro, Ocean/Mangels/30th to county boundary -- vol. 10. Ocean/Mangels to Golden Gate Park, 19th to Arguello/Twin Peaks. -- vol. 11. Sloat to Golden Gate Park, 19th to Pacific Ocean.
